rationale: Educ. Code §130.0101 governs junior college district library purchasing authority. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Notwithstanding any other law governing purchasing by a junior college district, including Section 130.010 or Subchapter B, Chapter 44, a junior college district may purchase, license, or otherwise acquire library goods and services in any manner authorized by law
_note: No conflict. The rule concerns library procurement by junior college districts and is unrelated to the homestead exemption increase.
